stemHtml: An aircraft has three holds situated at 20 in, 120 in and 240 in aft of the datum, identified as holds A,B and C respectively. The total aircraft mass is 4 900 kg and the CG is 50 in aft of the datum. The CG limits are from 35 in to 65 in aft of the datum. How much load must be removed from hold C to ensure that the CG is positioned on the forward limit?
